chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Made Permissible and Prohibited in Marriage

text: 4441 - وَ رُوِيَ: "أَنَّ مَنْ دَخَلَ بِامْرَأَةٍ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَبْلُغَ تِسْعَ سِنِينَ فَأَصَابَهَا عَيْبٌ فَهُوَ ضَامِنٌ" -

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4441 - And it is narrated:
"Whoever has intercourse with a woman before she reaches nine years of age, and she suffers harm, he is liable (for compensation)."
